chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Spl. Cr. Appeal No. D – 43 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For directions 03.09.2025 M/s Farhan Ali Shaikh and Ateeq-ur-Rehman Shaikh, Advocates for appellants. Mr. Muhammad Farooq Ali Jatoi, Special Prosecutor ANF..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned Counsels for the appellants require these proceedings to be disposed of as not pressed, as according to them, the appellants have since been released after completion of sentence. Learned Special Prosecutor ANF, however, disputes the element of completion of sentence, contenting that the appellants were given illegal remissions. The management of wrong on part of the officials being available with the State itself, and these proceedings being an appeal of the convicted persons, we do not find further agitation of this matter, as the State is well empowered to take action in accordance with law. Accordingly, the appeal stands disposed of as not pressed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
